docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,240.00 FILED BY RUBI, FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN PROTECTIVE SERVICES ENTERPRISES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-10-2004 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL SENT TO DENNIS MCKINNE AGENT FOR AMERICAN PROTECTIVE SERVICE ENTERPRISE, INC RETURNED SIGNED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUBI, FRANCISCO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN PROTECTIVE SERVICES ENTERPRISES INC. DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLTF MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED. $15.40 FEE PAID. SUBMITTED TO COMM FOR ORDER.
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION DENIED. PER COMM, PLTF STILL HAS THE BURDEN OF PROVING HIS CASE. AS INDI- CATED IN THE PLTF'S EXHIBITS, ON PAGE 2 UNDER THE
REASONS FOR DECISION, BY THE ADMINISTRATIVE LAW JUDGE, M. BERGER, WHO HEARD THE APPEAL OF THE OF THE PLTF'S INITIAL DENIAL OF HIS CLAIM: ". THE
CLAIMANT ADMITS THAT HE HAS BEEN UNABLE TO WORK OR PERFORM SERVICES IN GAINFUL EMPLOYMENT." THE REASONS FOR DECISION ALSO STATE: "A CLAIMANT IS
ELIGIBLE TO RECV BENEFITS WITH RESPECT TO ANY WEEK ONLY IF THE CLAIMANT WAS ABLE TO WORK & AVAILABLE TO WORK FOR THAT WEEK."
PLTF MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED. $15.40 FEE PAID. SUBMITTED TO COMM FOR ORDER.
PER ORDER OF COMM, MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATON DENIED. SEE COMMENTS FROM 2-7-05 DENIAL OF PLTF'S REQUEST FOR RECONSIDERATION. THE COURT DID REVIEW
THE 3-14-03 APPEALS BOARD DECISION, WHICH DENIES PLTF'S REQUEST FOR RECONSIDERATION. COPY OF ORDER MAILED TO BOTH PARTIES.
